description_long: This is a large, detached wooden garage with a steeply pitched red shingle roof and three skylight windows on each side of the roof. The front facade features a double-wide open bay supported by wooden posts, suitable for parking vehicles, and a single pedestrian door to the left. The rear and side walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, with the rear wall being solid and unadorned. The side walls each have three skylight windows, providing ample natural light to the upper level. The back of the garage is fully enclosed, while the front is open, allowing easy vehicle access. The structure is robust and utilitarian, with a simple, functional design that fits well in suburban or rural neighborhoods.
description: A large wooden garage with a red shingle roof, open double bay, and multiple skylight windows. The structure is sturdy and functional, with a simple, practical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open double bay, wooden posts, and a single pedestrian door on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the three skylight windows on the roof and large glass windows at the gable end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wooden wall with three skylight windows on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wooden wall and three skylight windows on the roof.
